news.t: Leverage Shares by Themes Launches another New Single Stock Leveraged ETFs, Bringing Investors Exciting Opportunities to Amplify Exposure to Palantir (PLTR)

overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long PLTR Daily ETF (PLTG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Palantir Technologies Inc. (PLTR) stock, less fees, and expenses. PLTG was launched on Apr 25, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.

data.title: Leverage Shares by Themes Launches another New Single Stock Leveraged ETFs, Bringing Investors Exciting Opportunities to Amplify Exposure to Palantir (PLTR)
data.text: GREENWICH, Conn., April 25, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Leverage Shares by Themes, an issuer of innovative exchange-traded products, is thrilled to announce the launch of a new single stock leveraged ETF...
